title: CasinoCraft
body:
# 🎰 CasinoCraft (Beta) for Minecraft 1.20.1 🎲
_Decorate your world with the glamour of a full-blown casino!_

CasinoCraft is a decorative mod designed to bring stylish, modern casino aesthetics into your Minecraft builds. From sleek blackjack tables to elegant velvet ropes, this mod is perfect for server lounges, city builds, or any roleplay environment that needs a touch of luxury.

## 🛠️ Why is it in Beta?
This version is marked as beta because custom voxel shapes are still missing. All blocks currently use basic block shapes. Once voxel shaping is implemented, models will better reflect their real-world counterparts.

## 🧱 Available Items & Blocks:

### 🃏 Casino Tables & Machines:

- Blackjack table
- Roulette table
- Craps table
- Slot machine (1–6 variants)
- Premium slot machine
- Blank table
- Wheel machine
- Roulette unit
- Closed roulette (cupola)
- Roulette

### 💺 Furniture & Decor:

- Brown casino chair
- Red casino chair
- Stool
- Red sofa
- Armchair
- Ottoman
- Coffee table
- Pot tree
- Bush
- Velvet rope
- Vending machine
- Billiard table
- Billiard stick stand
- Ashtray

### 🎲 Casino Accessories:

- Cards and tokens
- Tokens
- Token set

### 🚪 Signs & Lights:

- Casino sign
- Poker sign
- LED sign
- LED sign 2
